items.description: This weekend, I improved my mobile fitness app and built a mcp server for it so I can get my latest workout stats and update the app's workouts via Claude/Codex/etc. This shit is too fun. https://t.co/bSzpGbkvPP
items.description_zh: 这个周末，我改进了我的移动健身应用程序并为其构建了一个 mcp 服务器，这样我就可以获取最新的锻炼统计数据并通过 Claude/Codex/等更新应用程序的锻炼情况。这玩意儿也太好玩了吧https://t.co/bSzpGbkvPP

items.title: The secret to an articulate agent like mine isn't one file.
items.title_zh: 对于像我这样能言善辩的特工来说，秘诀不在于一份文件。
items.description: The secret to an articulate agent like mine isn't one file. It's three: SOUL.md — Who the agent IS. Voice, values, operating principles, what good output looks like, what bad output looks like. Not a system prompt, a constitution. Mine say…
items.description_zh: 对于像我这样能言善辩的特工来说，秘诀不在于一份文件。这是三个：SOUL.md — 特工是谁。声音、价值观、运营原则、好的产出是什么样子，坏的产出是什么样子。不是系统提示，是宪法。我的说……

items.title: Also a funny thing: my OpenClaw knowing my full schedule and also my health goals and ref…
items.title_zh: 还有一件有趣的事情：我的 OpenClaw 知道我的完整日程安排以及我的健康目标和参考……
items.description: Also a funny thing: my OpenClaw knowing my full schedule and also my health goals and refusing to respond to my queries after 12:30am. Amazing @steipete
items.description_zh: 还有一件有趣的事情：我的 OpenClaw 知道我的完整日程安排和我的健康目标，但在中午 12:30 后拒绝回复我的询问。太棒了@steipete

items.title: Released wacrawl 0.2.0.
items.description: Released wacrawl 0.2.0. New: encrypted Git backup/restore for WhatsApp Desktop archives. `wacrawl backup push` writes age-encrypted shards to GitHub; `backup pull` decrypts, verifies, and restores locally. https://t.co/gzCQO6eSAe
items.description_zh: 发布了 wacrawl 0.2.0。新功能：WhatsApp 桌面档案的加密 Git 备份/恢复。 `wacrawl backup push` 将年龄加密的分片写入 GitHub； `backup pull`在本地解密、验证和恢复。 https://t.co/gzCQO6eSAe
